name: agentic-wallet-benchmark
description: Reproducible adversarial benchmark for agentic wallet spend policies on Tempo Moderato

scripts.contracts:build: export PATH="$HOME/.foundry/bin:$PATH" && cd contracts && forge build && node ../scripts/sync-intermediary-artifact.mjs
scripts.deploy:intermediary: export PATH="$HOME/.foundry/bin:$PATH" && cd contracts && forge create Intermediary.sol:Intermediary --constructor-args $EVIL_ADDRESS --rpc-url ${TEMPO_RPC_URL:-https://rpc.moderato.tempo.xyz} --private-key $OWNER_PRIVATE_KEY
